name: login-blank-password-local-ok
desc: Allow the remastered login scene to submit while the native-resolution input hitboxes are still misrouting typed text into the password slot. This is a narrow local-validation bypass for the current native-login hitbox regression; the server remains authoritative for accepting or rejecting credentials.
verified: RE-confirmed in FUN_0051a370 case 1: after copying account field 3/0 and password field 3/1, VA 0x0051a672 and 0x0051a67d are the account/password zero-length branches to the same local error, and FUN_0051bc20(param_1,param_2) stores param_1 as the account/global login label and param_2 as the password. Current live native-layout evidence shows WM_CHAR lands in the password slot even when clicking the visible ID field, so this patch NOPs both local empty-field branches and passes the password slot as both FUN_0051bc20 arguments. Server-side auth remains the real gate.

patches.note: login local validation: ignore blank account field while native hitboxes route text into password slot
login local validation: ignore blank password field
login submit: pass password slot as account argument while account field hitbox is unresolved
